case_title: WANG, JOE DBA JOE WANG CARPET AND FLOORING VS CHARLES DAVID OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,981.69 FILED BY WANG, JOE DBA JOE WANG CARPET AND FLOORING AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES DAVID OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, JOE DBA JOE WANG CARPET AND FLOORING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARLES DAVID OF CALIFORNIA $4,590.69 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,675.69, IN ADDITION TO THIS AWARD OF DAMAGES, WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF JUDGMENT PLAINTIFF SHALL REPAIR THE DEFECTIVE FLOORING IN THE STOCKROOM OF DEFENDANT'S STORE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO JOE WANG DBA JOE WANG CARPET & FLOORING.
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CHARLES DAVID OF CALIFORNIA.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES DAVID OF CALIFORNIA
